sprint.sprint_goal: Deliver a read-only Account Balance Comparison Dashboard for retail customers showing their own accounts ranked by balance (desc) on a mobile-first UI with p95 < 500ms, reusing the existing AccountClient and AccountInfo from money-transfer, demo-able on staging by 2026-06-04.

top_stories_for_ba_expansion.title: List my accounts ranked by balance (desc)
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.i_want: to see all my own accounts in a single list ordered from highest to lowest balance
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.so_that: I can compare my balances at a glance and decide where to move funds
new_work: balance-dashboard aggregation endpoint (SA to decide service boundary via ADR)
ba_must_cover_ac: Authorization — only the authenticated customer's own accounts are returned (no cross-customer leakage)
Ranking determinism when balances are equal (tie-breaker rule needed — BA to propose: by accountType then accountId)
Empty-state behavior when customer has zero accounts
Currency-mixed list behavior (rank within same currency or across — depends on OPEN-001 resolution)
Audit event emitted on every successful retrieval with purpose=balance-inquiry
nfr_seeds: p95 < 500ms warm cache, p95 < 1000ms cold cache for 10 accounts

top_stories_for_ba_expansion.title: See per-account details (type, balance, currency, last updated)
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.i_want: each row to clearly show account type, balance, currency, and when it was last updated
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.so_that: I have enough context to act on the comparison
reuse: AccountInfo fields (accountId, accountNumber masked, accountType, balance, currency, status, lastUpdatedAt)
ba_must_cover_ac: Account number is always masked per existing PDPA convention (last 4 visible)
accountType displays as human-readable label, not enum
lastUpdatedAt definition resolved — see OPEN-002 (ledger balance_as_of vs row updated_at)
Only deposit-style account types appear per OPEN-004 (no loan/credit-card balances unless stakeholder overrides)
nfr_seeds: No full account number in DOM, network payload, or browser console; Lighthouse a11y >= 90

top_stories_for_ba_expansion.title: Dashboard meets p95 < 500ms for 10 accounts
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.as_a: authenticated retail customer on a mobile device
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.i_want: the dashboard to feel instant when I open it
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.so_that: I do not abandon the screen on 4G networks
new_work: Redis cache key strategy customer:{id}:accounts TTL 30s
Grafana panel for cache hit ratio
ba_must_cover_ac: p95 < 500ms measured with 10-account warm cache via Gatling/k6 against staging
p95 < 1000ms acceptable on cold cache (documented graceful degradation)
Cache invalidation rule documented (TTL only for v1; event-driven invalidation deferred to next sprint)
Audit event must not be suppressed by cache hit (always emit)
nfr_seeds: Cache hit ratio > 70% target after warm-up
No silent cache failure — fail-open to AccountClient

top_stories_for_ba_expansion.title: Mobile-first responsive layout and a11y AA
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.as_a: retail customer using a mobile device or screen reader
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.i_want: the dashboard to be usable on small screens and assistive tech
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.so_that: the feature is accessible to all customers
top_stories_for_ba_expansion.drop_condition: If reviewer iterations exceed 2 rounds by D8 or any MUST story slips
reuse: existing design system tokens (Designer P2 to map)
existing a11y utilities in Angular base
ba_must_cover_ac: Works without horizontal scroll at 375px viewport
Screen reader announces rank position and balance for each row

deferred_stories.title: Total wealth in home currency (multi-currency aggregation)
deferred_stories.reason: OPEN-001 FX source decision required; default-path is to drop from this sprint

must_reuse_not_rebuild: AccountClient (Spring Boot REST/Feign client from money-transfer)
Audit logging interceptor and audit-service event emitter

new_assets_expected: balance-dashboard aggregation endpoint (SA: decide service boundary)
Redis cache key strategy and invalidation policy
OpenAPI spec for the new endpoint
Test plan covering ranking determinism, currency handling, perf
Grafana panel: latency, cache hit ratio, audit-event rate

after_ba_001.rationale: Designer P1 and QA P1 must NOT wait for SA — they consume BA stories directly per workflow.md

after_tl_001.rationale: DevOps P1 starts on Dockerfile/Helm skeleton while devs implement; saves D10 deployment time

early_security_look.scope: Consent-coverage review only (RISK-003 mitigation) — not full SAST gate
early_security_look.rationale: Catch PDPA consent gap by D2-D3 instead of D9

open_decisions_for_ba_to_clarify.question: FX rate source for multi-currency display
open_decisions_for_ba_to_clarify.default_if_unanswered: Option A — drop US-BC-004 to follow-up sprint

open_decisions_for_ba_to_clarify.question: Which account types are in scope

exit_criteria_for_sprint: All MUST stories pass demo acceptance criteria on staging by 2026-06-04 09:00 ICT
DoD universal + banking-specific checklist fully checked
p95 < 500ms warm-cache for 10 accounts verified by QA evidence
Audit event emitted for every dashboard load (BoT compliance evidence)
Lighthouse mobile a11y >= 90 on demo page
Stakeholder summary report emitted by banking-pm post-demo
RAID log updated with carry-over items

top_risks.headline: FX rate source for multi-currency display undecided
10-day demo window is tight
top_risks.default_mitigation: reuse-first policy + shift-left parallel tracks + sacrificial stretch (US-BC-005)

top_risks.headline: PDPA consent reuse from money-transfer needs verification
top_risks.default_mitigation: early-look security review at D2-D3 (not D9)

regulatory: PDPA Thailand (data minimization, audit trail of personal data access)

metadata.notes: PM-001 initial intake. BA must resolve OPEN-001..004 with stakeholder by 2026-05-22 EOD before SA starts ADRs. Player must enforce shift-left parallel invocation (Designer P1 + QA P1 fire-with-SA, DevOps P1 fire-with-devs).
